input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.1.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.1.4
            TITLE: main hoop

            CONTENT:
            rule F.1.4: Main Hoop
F.1.4 Main Hoop 
A roll bar located alongside or immediately aft of the driver’s torso.

final_answer: rule F.1.4: Main Hoop F.1.4 Main Hoop A roll bar located alongside or immediately aft of the driver’s torso.
